kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Open a web page with the specified URL.

kw.name: Click On Element
Wait Until Element Visible Custom
Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Wait until element xpath://div[@class='lf']//span[contains(text(),'Đăng nhập')] is visible with timeout 10s
[STEP] Wait until element xpath://div[@class='lf']//span[contains(text(),'Đăng nhập')] is visible with timeout 10s
kw.arg: Wait until element ${locator} is visible with timeout ${timeout}

kw.name: Step Log
kw.arg: Wait until element ${locator} is visible with timeout ${timeout}

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Wait until the specified element is visible on the page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Click on a specified element.
Navigate to the login page

kw.name: Fill Login Form
Input Text To Element
Wait Until Element Visible Custom
Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Wait until element css:input[placeholder='Email'] is visible with timeout 10s
[STEP] Wait until element css:input[placeholder='Email'] is visible with timeout 10s
kw.arg: Wait until element ${locator} is visible with timeout ${timeout}

kw.name: Step Log
kw.arg: Wait until element ${locator} is visible with timeout ${timeout}

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Wait until the specified element is visible on the page.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Input text into a specified element.

Wait Until Element Visible Custom
Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Wait until element css:input[placeholder='Password'] is visible with timeout 10s

kw.arg: Wait until element ${locator} is visible with timeout ${timeout}

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Wait until the specified element is visible on the page.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

Fill in the login form with provided email and password

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Submit the login form

kw.name: Verify Element Text Contains
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Text: Tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác
[STEP] Text: Tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác

kw.name: Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Expected: Tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác
[STEP] Expected: Tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.arg: Tài khoản hoặc mật khẩu không chính xác
kw.doc: Verify that the text of the element located by the given locator contains the expected text.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Verify Required Field Message
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Actual validation message: Please fill out this field.
[STEP] Actual validation message: Please fill out this field.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.msg: [STEP] Expected validation message: Please fill out this field.
[STEP] Expected validation message: Please fill out this field.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verify the validation message for required fields or invalid input.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: login Auto Test 1

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath://div[@class='lf']//span[contains(text(),'Tài khoản')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath://div[@class='lf']//span[contains(text(),'Tài khoản')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Verify that the text of the element located by the given locator contains the expected text.
kw.status: Element 'xpath://div[@class='lf']//span[contains(text(),'Tài khoản')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Verify Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Verify that the page contains the specified element.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Run Keyword If Test Failed
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.status: Element 'xpath://div[@class='lf']//span[contains(text(),'Tài khoản')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
